description: Policy for generating post-incident review packets from replay, rollback, and release evidence.

cache_miss_storm: Add cache-warm validation before increasing traffic.
Track cache miss rate as a release blocker in the rollout checklist.
dependency_timeout: Add bounded retry and fallback-feature behavior for feature-store timeouts.
Page the dependency owner when feature-store latency breaches the SLO envelope.
rollout_regression: Require canary comparison against the stable service version before promotion.
Keep rollback instructions tied to service.version and image digest evidence.
collector_queue_pressure: Validate persistent collector queue storage before declaring dashboards healthy.
Add telemetry-loss checks to release review so app health and evidence health are separated.
